1→package transflow

     3→import (
     4→	"context"
     5→	"fmt"
     6→	"os"
     7→	"path/filepath"

    14→
    15→// GitOperationsInterface defines the Git operations needed by the runner
    16→type GitOperationsInterface interface {
    17→	CloneRepository(ctx context.Context, repoURL, branch, targetPath string) error
    18→	CreateBranchAndCheckout(ctx context.Context, repoPath, branchName string) error
    19→	CommitChanges(ctx context.Context, repoPath, message string) error
    20→	PushBranch(ctx context.Context, repoPath, remoteURL, branchName string) error
    21→}
    22→
    23→// RecipeExecutorInterface defines the recipe execution interface
    24→type RecipeExecutorInterface interface {
    25→	ExecuteRecipes(ctx context.Context, workspacePath string, recipeIDs []string) error
    26→}
    27→
    28→// BuildCheckerInterface defines the build check interface
    29→type BuildCheckerInterface interface {
    30→	CheckBuild(ctx context.Context, config common.DeployConfig) (*common.DeployResult, error)
    31→}
    32→
    33→// StepResult represents the result of executing a single step
    34→type StepResult struct {
    35→	StepID   string
    36→	Success  bool
    37→	Message  string
    38→	Duration time.Duration
    39→}
    40→
    41→// TransflowResult represents the overall result of a transflow execution
    42→type TransflowResult struct {
    43→	Success        bool
    44→	WorkflowID     string
    45→	BranchName     string
    46→	CommitSHA      string
    47→	BuildVersion   string
    48→	StepResults    []StepResult
    49→	ErrorMessage   string
    50→	Duration       time.Duration

content.text: Let me read more of the runner to see the GitLab integration implementation:

content.content:
500→		result.Duration = time.Since(startTime)
   501→		return nil, fmt.Errorf("failed to push branch: %w", err)
   502→	}
   503→	result.StepResults = append(result.StepResults, StepResult{
   504→		StepID:  "push",
   505→		Success: true,
   506→		Message: fmt.Sprintf("Pushed branch %s", branchName),
   507→	})
   508→
   509→	// Step 7: Create or update GitLab merge request (if GitProvider is configured)
   510→	if r.gitProvider != nil {
   511→		mrStart := time.Now()
   512→		if err := r.gitProvider.ValidateConfiguration(); err != nil {
   513→			// MR creation is optional - log but don't fail the workflow
   514→			result.StepResults = append(result.StepResults, StepResult{
   515→				StepID:   "mr",
   516→				Success:  false,
   517→				Message:  fmt.Sprintf("MR creation skipped - configuration invalid: %v", err),
   518→				Duration: time.Since(mrStart),
   519→			})
   520→		} else {
   521→			mrConfig := provider.MRConfig{
   522→				RepoURL:      r.config.TargetRepo,
   523→				SourceBranch: branchName,
   524→				TargetBranch: r.config.BaseRef,
   525→				Title:        fmt.Sprintf("Transflow: %s", r.config.ID),
   526→				Description:  r.generateMRDescription(result),
   527→				Labels:       []string{"ploy", "tfl"},
   528→			}
   529→
   530→			mrResult, err := r.gitProvider.CreateOrUpdateMR(ctx, mrConfig)
   531→			if err != nil {
   532→				// MR creation is optional - log but don't fail the workflow
   533→				result.StepResults = append(result.StepResults, StepResult{
   534→					StepID:   "mr",
   535→					Success:  false,
   536→					Message:  fmt.Sprintf("MR creation failed: %v", err),
   537→					Duration: time.Since(mrStart),
   538→				})
   539→			} else {
   540→				action := "created"
   541→				if !mrResult.Created {
   542→					action = "updated"
   543→				}
   544→				result.StepResults = append(result.StepResults, StepResult{
   545→					StepID:   "mr",
   546→					Success:  true,
   547→					Message:  fmt.Sprintf("MR %s: %s", action, mrResult.MRURL),
   548→					Duration: time.Since(mrStart),
   549→				})
   550→				result.MRURL = mrResult.MRURL
   551→			}
   552→		}
   553→	}
   554→
   555→	// Success!
   556→	result.Success = true
   557→	result.Duration = time.Since(startTime)
   558→	return result, nil
   559→}
   560→
   561→// generateMRDescription creates a descriptive merge request body based on workflow results
   562→func (r *TransflowRunner) generateMRDescription(result *TransflowResult) string {
   563→	var description strings.Builder
   564→
   565→	description.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("## Transflow Workflow: %s\n\n", r.config.ID))
   566→
   567→	// Add basic workflow information
   568→	description.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("**Branch:** %s\n", result.BranchName))
   569→	if result.BuildVersion != "" {
   570→		description.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("**Build Version:** %s\n", result.BuildVersion))
   571→	}
   572→	description.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("**Duration:** %s\n\n", result.Duration.String()))
   573→
   574→	// Add applied transformations
   575→	description.WriteString("## Applied Transformations\n\n")
   576→	for _, step := range result.StepResults {
   577→		if step.StepID != "mr" && step.Success {
   578→			description.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("- ✅ **%s**: %s\n", strings.Title(step.StepID), step.Message))
   579→		}
   580→	}
   581→
   582→	// Add healing information if present
   583→	if result.HealingSummary != nil && result.HealingSummary.Winner != nil {
   584→		description.WriteString("\n## Self-Healing Applied\n\n")
   585→		description.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("- **Plan ID:** %s\n", result.HealingSummary.PlanID))
   586→		description.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("- **Winning Strategy:** %s\n", result.HealingSummary.Winner.ID))
   587→		description.WriteString(fmt.Sprintf("- **Attempts:** %d\n", result.HealingSummary.AttemptsCount))
   588→	}
   589→
   590→	// Add footer with automation info
   591→	description.WriteString("\n---\n")
   592→	description.WriteString("🤖 *This merge request was automatically created by Ploy Transflow*\n")
   593→	description.WriteString("📝 *Labels: ploy, tfl*")
   594→
   595→	return description.String()
   596→}
   597→
   598→// attemptHealing orchestrates the healing workflow: planner → fanout → reducer
   599→func (r *TransflowRunner) attemptHealing(ctx context.Context, repoPath string, buildError string) (*TransflowHealingSummary, error) {
